name: News Corporation
description: News Corporation, commonly known as News Corp, is a prominent American multinational mass media and information services conglomerate headquartered in New York City. The company operates across a diverse range of sectors, including newspaper publishing, book publishing, and digital real estate services. With a global footprint, News Corp delivers authoritative and engaging content through some of the world’s most trusted brands, including The Wall Street Journal, The Times, and HarperCollins. It focuses on providing high-quality journalism and information to audiences worldwide while maintaining a significant presence in the digital media and professional information markets.
